pi_items.source: task description and verifier.py logic explicitly specify '127.0.0.1' or 'localhost'.
task description and verifier.py logic explicitly specify port 10110.
task description and export_result.sh use this exact path.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on the Bridge Command simulator to generate synthetic NMEA data at runtime. The agent is required to configure the simulator's UDP Address to 127.0.0.1 and UDP Port to 10110 in the /home/ga/.config/Bridge Command/bc5.ini file. The target python script must be created at /home/ga/Desktop/capture_nmea.py, outputting logs to /home/ga/Documents/nmea_raw.log, and the final report must be saved at /home/ga/Documents/integration_report.txt. All required paths and configuration values have been explicitly verified against the setup and evaluation scripts.
